study_title: transcriptome analysis of Apis mellifera mandibular glands from age-matched nurses and foragers
design: In brief, the mRNAs were enriched, fragmented into short pieces (about 300 nt) and reverse transcribed to cDNAs with a random hexamer primer and M-MuLV Reverse Transcriptase (RNase H-). Sequencing adaptors were ligated to the cDNA fragments through PCR amplification. Sequencing analysis was performed using HiSeq X Ten (Illumina, Inc. San Diego, USA), and 150 bp paired end reads were generated.
lab: College of Animal Sciences (College of Bee Science
